title: Run ticket board red-pen interaction pass
goal: Assess ticket-planning board interaction quality and return prioritized, evidence-backed UX corrections before parity claims.

steps.text: Define in-scope ticket-board flows and benchmark references for the review pass.
Evaluate lane and ticket flows using interaction-quality-rubric and planning-board-ux-patterns.
Record findings by severity using interaction-quality-report-template with deterministic IDs and reproduction notes.
Compute quality score and classify result (`go`, `go-with-notes`, `stop`).
Pause for AJ review before implementing any major or blocker remediation.

acceptanceCriteria: Review output includes all required report-template sections
Every blocker or major finding has owner and disposition
Scorecard includes evidence per rubric dimension
Recommendation order is prioritized by user impact and risk

verification.text: Confirm report includes scorecard, findings list, and stop/go classification
Confirm blocker findings include reproducible steps and proposed fixes
